tools.name: projects.artifactregistryProjectsLocationsList
tools.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.

tools.name: projects.artifactregistryProjectsLocationsRepositoriesAptArtifactsImport
tools.description: Imports Apt artifacts. The returned Operation will complete once the resources are imported. Package, Version, and File resources are created based on the imported artifacts. Imported artifacts that conflict with existing resources are ignored.

tools.name: projects.artifactregistryProjectsLocationsRepositoriesAptArtifactsUpload
tools.description: Directly uploads an Apt artifact. The returned Operation will complete once the resources are uploaded. Package, Version, and File resources are created based on the imported artifact. Imported artifacts that conflict with existing resources are ignored.

tools.name: projects.artifactregistryProjectsLocationsRepositoriesCreate
tools.description: Creates a repository. The returned Operation will finish once the repository has been created. Its response will be the created Repository.

tools.name: projects.artifactregistryProjectsLocationsRepositoriesDockerImagesList
tools.description: Lists docker images.

tools.name: projects.artifactregistryProjectsLocationsRepositoriesFilesList
tools.description: Lists files.

tools.name: projects.artifactregistryProjectsLocationsRepositoriesGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Gets the IAM policy for a given resource.

tools.name: projects.artifactregistryProjectsLocationsRepositoriesKfpArtifactsUpload
tools.description: Directly uploads a KFP artifact. The returned Operation will complete once the resource is uploaded. Package, Version, and File resources will be created based on the uploaded artifact. Uploaded artifacts that conflict with existing resources will be overwritten.

tools.name: projects.artifactregistryProjectsLocationsRepositoriesList
tools.description: Lists repositories.

tools.name: projects.artifactregistryProjectsLocationsRepositoriesMavenArtifactsList
tools.description: Lists maven artifacts.

tools.name: projects.artifactregistryProjectsLocationsRepositoriesNpmPackagesList
tools.description: Lists npm packages.

tools.name: projects.artifactregistryProjectsLocationsRepositoriesPackagesList
tools.description: Lists packages.

tools.name: projects.artifactregistryProjectsLocationsRepositoriesPackagesTagsCreate
tools.description: Creates a tag.

tools.name: projects.artifactregistryProjectsLocationsRepositoriesPackagesTagsList
tools.description: Lists tags.

tools.name: projects.artifactregistryProjectsLocationsRepositoriesPackagesTagsPatch
tools.description: Updates a tag.

tools.name: projects.artifactregistryProjectsLocationsRepositoriesPackagesVersionsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a version and all of its content. The returned operation will complete once the version has been deleted.

tools.name: projects.artifactregistryProjectsLocationsRepositoriesPackagesVersionsList
tools.description: Lists versions.

tools.name: projects.artifactregistryProjectsLocationsRepositoriesPythonPackagesGet
tools.description: Gets a python package.

tools.name: projects.artifactregistryProjectsLocationsRepositoriesPythonPackagesList
tools.description: Lists python packages.

tools.name: projects.artifactregistryProjectsLocationsRepositoriesSetIamPolicy
tools.description: Updates the IAM policy for a given resource.

tools.name: projects.artifactregistryProjectsLocationsRepositoriesTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Tests if the caller has a list of permissions on a resource.

tools.name: projects.artifactregistryProjectsLocationsRepositoriesYumArtifactsImport
tools.description: Imports Yum (RPM) artifacts. The returned Operation will complete once the resources are imported. Package, Version, and File resources are created based on the imported artifacts. Imported artifacts that conflict with existing resources are ignored.

tools.name: projects.artifactregistryProjectsLocationsRepositoriesYumArtifactsUpload
tools.description: Directly uploads a Yum artifact. The returned Operation will complete once the resources are uploaded. Package, Version, and File resources are created based on the imported artifact. Imported artifacts that conflict with existing resources are ignored.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
